# Sagar Pansuriya - AI Context & Profile

## Identity & Professional Summary
- **Name:** Sagar Pansuriya
- **Title:** Technical Lead & Frontend Architect
- **Location:** Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India
- **Current Role:** Leading frontend teams at Acquaint Softtech Private Limited
- **Email:** pansuriya.sagar94@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://sagarpansuriya.in/
- **Brand/Handle:** theunwindfront

## About
Sagar Pansuriya is a Technical Lead and Frontend Architect with over 10 years of experience scaling frontend teams and shipping 50+ web applications. He is an expert in modern web development, including:
- **Frontend:** React, Vue.js, JavaScript, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Alpine.js, GSAP, Modern CSS
- **Backend/Full-stack:** Laravel (TALL Stack), WordPress
- **Architecture:** Frontend Architecture, Open Source Contribution, Technical Leadership
